top_signals.title: CISA to transform how it assesses cyber vulnerabilities and risks, Andersen says
top_signals.summary: A binding operational directive being released Wednesday will direct federal agencies to change the way they address vulnerabilities by elevating some while putting others to the side.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: With Pope Leo’s blessing, Barcelona’s Sagrada Familia reaches new heights
top_signals.summary: The pontiff said the fact the basilica is yet unfinished does not mar its beauty but rather serves to remind believers "that ‌the Christian life is always a journey."
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ’Filter of fantasy’: Psychiatrist trials anime therapy for depression
top_signals.summary: Francesco Panto's team gave participants online counseling delivered by a psychologist who appeared on the screen as an anime avatar with a digitally altered voice.
